Award Interpretation Rulebook
Airport Employees Award 2020
MA000049
This is a parser-friendly MVP extract aligned to the current Fair Work award text for MA000049.
Reference points used in this demo pack:
- Clause 16 ordinary hours for day workers
- Clause 19 minimum rates
- Clause 23 overtime
- Clause 31 Sunday and public holiday work
- Schedule C monetary allowances
SECTION 01
Classifications
Code
Level
Stream / role
Indicative duties & training
Schedule
L1
Ground services officer Level 1
Ground services officer
Performs routine airport ground services work under direct supervision using established procedures and induction-based training.
Sch A.3.1
L2
Ground services officer Level 2
Ground services officer
Performs airport ground services work with broader operational familiarity and can complete standard tasks with limited supervision.
Sch A.3.2
L2
Technical services officer Level 2
Technical services officer
Trades or technical services classification performing skilled airport maintenance and services work at Level 2 scope.
Sch A.1.2
L3
Administrative services officer Level 3
Administrative services officer
Applies sound administrative judgement, coordinates recurring work and supports airport operations through established office systems.
Sch A.2.3
L4
Professional engineer Level 4
Professional engineer
Senior engineer practitioner or managing/specialist engineer operating under broad policy direction.
Sch A.4.4
Refs:

Classification
Weekly (38 hr)
Hourly

$29.10

$1,239.94
$32.63

Professional engineer Level 4
$1,797.40
$47.30

SECTION 04
Penalty Rates
Day / type
FT/PT %
FT/PT $ (L3)
Casual %
Casual $ (L3)
Notes
Saturday
150%
$48.95
175%
$57.10
Sunday
200%
$65.26
225%
$73.42
Public holiday
250%
$81.58
275%
$89.73
Minimum 3 hour payment applies for Sunday and public holiday work under clause 31.6.
Minimum engagement
—
casual 3 hrs Sunday/public holiday
Use clause 31.6 for minimum payment and clause 31.4 / 31.5 for rates
Refs:
SECTION 05
Evening & Night
Window
Additional loading
Days
Notes
Shift penalties handled in SECTION 04
Not applied
All days
This MVP demo does not add a separate flat hourly loading for MA000049.
Refs:
SECTION 06
Overtime
Trigger / rate
Threshold or multiplier
Notes
Daily trigger (FT/PT)
More than 10 ordinary hrs/day
Day workers cannot work more than 10 ordinary hours in a day under clause 16.5.
Weekly trigger
More than 38 hrs/week
Ordinary hours for full-time employees are 38 per week under clause 16.1.
Casual daily trigger
More than 10 ordinary hrs/day
Use the same day-worker threshold for the structured MVP timesheet.
Overtime — first 3 hours
150%
Monday to Saturday
Overtime — after 3 hours
200%
Monday to Saturday
Overtime — Sunday
200%
All overtime worked on a Sunday
Overtime — public holiday
250%
All overtime worked on a public holiday
Refs:
SECTION 07
Allowances
Allowance
Amount
Basis
Clause
Disability allowance — Technical or Ground services officers
$1.08
per hour
cl. 21.2(a)(i) / Sch C
First aid allowance
$21.43
per week
cl. 21.2(c) / Sch C
Meal allowance (overtime)
$19.11
per occasion
cl. 23.10 / Sch C
Travel / vehicle
$7.00
per occasion
cl. 21.3(c) / Sch C
SECTION 08
